# Music Video Generator

> AI music video generator that turns song lyrics into scene prompts, generated images, and a rendered video with a director workflow for iterative fixes.

This file provides a concise map for LLMs. Use the linked markdown files for deeper context.

## Product Docs

- [Project overview](/llms/project-overview.md): High-level architecture, stack, and core entities.
- [Frontend routes](/llms/frontend-routes.md): User-facing routes and page responsibilities.
- [Pipeline flow](/llms/pipeline.md): End-to-end generation pipeline and outputs.

## API

- [Backend API reference](/llms/backend-api.md): Main REST endpoints and local development notes.

## Optional

- [Main repository README](/llms/readme-extract.md): Extracted operational notes for local setup and scripts.
